ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithm_trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "generation" INTEGER /* Generation number associated with the trial */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* Iteration number within the generation */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number within the iteration */,
  "fitness_value" REAL /* Fitness value achieved in the trial */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trial */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trial */,
  "trial_status" TEXT /* Status of the trial (e.g., completed, failed, pending) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial it belongs to */,
  "variable_type" TEXT /* Type of variable (e.g., Vl, Vr) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the variable for the trial */,
  "lower_bound" REAL /* Lower bound for the variable */,
  "upper_bound" REAL /* Upper bound for the variable */,
  "step_size" REAL /* Step size for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fitness_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fitness metric */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial associated with the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of fitness metric (e.g., total fitness, average fitness) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the fitness metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., units, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fitness_metrics_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, contributor) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the collaboration */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial it belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., mutation rate) */,
  "param_value" REAL /* Value of the parameter for the trial */,
  "param_type" TEXT /* Type of parameter (e.g., real, integer) */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_parameters_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the team was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the team */,
  "leave_date" TEXT /* Date the user left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_memberships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_tags_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the trial */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_comments_trial_id FOREIGN KEY ("trial_id") REFERENCES algorithm_trials ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "config_description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the configuration was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
